a.xlink:title: Gets or creates the root node for a specific token and channel.
Add node to specific processing token and channel.
Cleans up the current operation, disconnecting the entity and resetting state.
Process a specific channel within a token domain.
Process a single sample for a specific channel.
Remove node from a specific processing token and channel.
Inspect a single RootNode for a specific token and channel.
Activates a node for a specified duration.
Initializes the chain node.
Initializes the binary operation node.
Routes a node's output to specific channels within a token domain.
Processes a single data sample.
Processes multiple samples at once.
Processes a single sample through both nodes and combines the results.
Processes multiple samples through both nodes and combines the results.
Activates a buffer for a specified duration.
Activates a node network for a specified duration.
Cancels any currently active node.
Process all channels for a token and return channel-separated data.
Cleans up completed routing transitions for a given token.
Inspect the full NodeGraphManager state across all active tokens.
Inspect all RootNodes for a token.
